# ShutterCount

> Free camera shutter count checker. Drop a RAW photo file and instantly read the shutter actuations directly in your browser — no server upload, no account required. Supports Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, Adobe DNG, and JPEG/JPG. Validated on 60+ camera models.

ShutterCount is a static, client-side web application hosted at shuttercount.app. All RAW file parsing happens entirely in the browser using JavaScript. No file content ever leaves the user's device. The shutter count is extracted from the EXIF MakerNote data embedded in the RAW file.

## Main Application

- [ShutterCount — Free Camera Shutter Count Checker](https://shuttercount.app/): The main tool. Drag and drop or select any supported RAW file to instantly display the camera's shutter count, camera model, and other EXIF metadata. Supports Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, Olympus, Panasonic, and DNG files.
- [Supported Camera Landing Pages](https://shuttercount.app/supported-cameras/): Central directory for model-specific camera landing pages with technical notes and shutter-count guidance.

## Canon Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Canon EOS R Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS R mirrorless camera. Explains how to read CR3 shutter count from EXIF, rated shutter life, and what the count means when buying used.
- [Canon EOS R1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r1-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Canon EOS R1 flagship mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS R3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS R3. Covers the electronic and mechanical shutter, rated life, and how to extract count from CR3 files.
- [Canon EOS R5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS R5. Includes rated mechanical shutter life (500,000 actuations), how to check via CR3 RAW file, and buying-used advice.
- [Canon EOS R6 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r6-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Canon EOS R6, including rated shutter life and CR3 EXIF extraction.
- [Canon EOS R6 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r6-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS R6 Mark II.
- [Canon EOS R7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r7-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Canon EOS R7 APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS R8 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r8-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS R8 entry-level full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS R10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r10-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Canon EOS R10 APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS R50 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r50-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS R50 compact mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS R100 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-r100-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Canon EOS R100 entry-level mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS RP Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-rp-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS RP full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Canon EOS 2000D Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-2000d-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS 2000D (Rebel T7 / 1500D, 2018) entry-level DSLR. Covers the 100,000-actuation rated shutter, CR2 RAW format (DIGIC 4+), how to check via shuttercount.app, and what counts are typical when buying this popular beginner camera used.
- [Canon EOS 40D Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-40d-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS 40D (2007) enthusiast APS-C DSLR. Covers the 100,000-actuation rated shutter, CR2 RAW format, how to check via shuttercount.app, and what to look for when buying this classic used camera — including the importance of verifying count on older bodies that may have accumulated significant actuations.
- [Canon EOS 700D Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/canon-700d-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Canon EOS 700D (Rebel T5i / Kiss X7i, 2013) entry-level DSLR. Covers the 100,000-actuation rated shutter, CR2 RAW format, articulating touchscreen, and what to check when buying this popular used camera — one of the best-selling Rebel-series bodies of its era.

## Nikon Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Nikon D500 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-d500-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon D500 APS-C DSLR. Covers rated shutter life (200,000 actuations) and NEF EXIF extraction.
- [Nikon D750 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-d750-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon D750 full-frame DSLR.
- [Nikon D850 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-d850-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon D850. Includes rated shutter life (200,000 actuations) and NEF EXIF count extraction.
- [Nikon Z5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Z5 entry-level full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon Z5 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z5-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon Z5 II.
- [Nikon Z6 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z6-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Z6 full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon Z6 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z6-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon Z6 II.
- [Nikon Z6 III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z6-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Z6 III with partial stacked sensor.
- [Nikon Z7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z7-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon Z7 high-resolution full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon Z7 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z7-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Z7 II.
- [Nikon Z8 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z8-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Z8. Unlike the Z9, the Z8 has a mechanical shutter rated at 500,000 actuations.
- [Nikon Z9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z9-shutter-count/): The Nikon Z9 has no mechanical shutter — its shutter count is always 0. Explains why the Z9 shutter count reads zero from NEF files and what to assess instead when buying used.
- [Nikon Z30 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z30-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon Z30 vlog-oriented APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon Z50 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z50-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Z50 APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon Z50 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-z50-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon Z50 II.
- [Nikon Zf Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-zf-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon Zf retro-styled full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon Zfc Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-zfc-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Nikon Zfc retro APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Nikon D3600 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/nikon-d3600-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Nikon D3600 (2016) entry-level APS-C DSLR. Covers the 100,000-actuation rated shutter, how to read from NEF files via MakerNote tag 0x00A7, the SnapBridge caveat, differences from the D3500, and buying guidance for this popular beginner DSLR.

## Sony Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Sony A1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony Alpha 1 flagship mirrorless camera. Covers ARW EXIF extraction and the 500,000-actuation rated shutter life.
- [Sony A6400 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a6400-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A6400 APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A6600 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a6600-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A6600 APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A6700 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a6700-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A6700 APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A7 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A7 II full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A7 III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A7 III, including rated 200,000-actuation shutter life.
- [Sony A7 IV Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7-iv-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A7 IV. Covers ARW shutter count extraction and rated shutter life.
- [Sony A7C Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7c-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A7C compact full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A7C II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7c-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A7C II.
- [Sony A7CR Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7cr-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A7CR high-resolution compact full-frame camera.
- [Sony A7R III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7r-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A7R III high-resolution mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A7R IV Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7r-iv-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A7R IV 61 MP mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A7R V Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7r-v-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A7R V flagship high-resolution mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A7S III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a7s-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A7S III video-oriented full-frame mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A9 sports mirrorless camera.
- [Sony A9 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a9-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony A9 II.
- [Sony A9 III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a9-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A9 III with global shutter sensor. Explains the electronic shutter implications for shutter count.
- [Sony ZV-E1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-zv-e1-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Sony ZV-E1 full-frame vlog camera.
- [Sony ZV-E10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-zv-e10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony ZV-E10 APS-C vlog camera.
- [Sony A5100 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a5100-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony A5100 (ILCE-5100, 2014) — the world's smallest APS-C mirrorless at launch. Covers the 100,000-actuation rated shutter, ARW MakerNote tag 0x9050 (encrypted cubic residue cipher), how to check via shuttercount.app, and buying guidance for this popular compact E-mount camera.
- [Sony a5000 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sony-a5000-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sony Alpha a5000 (2014) — Sony's most compact APS-C mirrorless at launch with Wi-Fi/NFC and 20.1 MP sensor. Covers the estimated ~100,000-actuation lifespan (Sony does not publish official ratings for this model), ARW MakerNote tag 0x9050, JPEG MakerNote stripping caveat, and what to look for when buying this entry-level E-mount camera used.

## Fujifilm Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Fujifilm GFX 100S II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx-100s-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX 100S II medium format mirrorless camera.
- [Fujifilm X-E4 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-e4-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Fujifilm X-E4 rangefinder-style APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Fujifilm X-H2 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-h2-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-H2 high-resolution APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Fujifilm X-H2S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-h2s-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Fujifilm X-H2S stacked-sensor sports APS-C camera.
- [Fujifilm X-S10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-s10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-S10 compact APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Fujifilm X-S20 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-s20-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Fujifilm X-S20.
- [Fujifilm X-T3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T3 enthusiast APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Fujifilm X-T4 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t4-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Fujifilm X-T4, including its 300,000-actuation rated shutter life.
- [Fujifilm X-T5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T5 40 MP APS-C mirrorless camera.
- [Fujifilm X-T50 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t50-shutter-count/): Shutter count information for the Fujifilm X-T50.
- [Fujifilm X100VI Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x100vi-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X100VI compact fixed-lens camera.
- [Fujifilm X-E1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-e1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-E1 (2012) — the first X-E rangefinder-style camera. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation shutter life (Fujifilm doesn't publish official ratings), RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, and what to look for when buying this vintage APS-C X-Trans I camera used.
- [Fujifilm X-T30 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t30-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T30 II (2021) — an incremental update to the X-T30 with a new rear LCD and backlit controls. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation lifespan (not officially published), RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, and the differences from the original X-T30.
- [Fujifilm X-M5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-m5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-M5 (2024) — Fujifilm's most compact X-mount camera with 26.1 MP X-Trans V sensor and fully articulated LCD. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation lifespan, RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, and buying guidance for this vlog-focused compact.
- [Fujifilm GFX100S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx100s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX100S (2021) — the original 102 MP compact medium format mirrorless camera. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter, how to read from RAF files via MakerNote tag 0x1438, shutter replacement cost considerations, and how the GFX100S compares to the GFX100S II for used-camera buyers.
- [Fujifilm GFX 50S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx50s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX 50S (2017) — the camera that launched the GFX medium format system. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter, RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, why medium format shutters have lower ratings than APS-C, shutter replacement cost (~€300–500), and buying guidance for this landmark 51.4 MP camera compared to the GFX 50S II.
- [Fujifilm X-T10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T10 (2015) — the compact, affordable companion to the X-T1. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation lifespan (not officially published by Fujifilm), RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, the card-format reset caveat, the X-Trans CMOS II sensor, lack of weather sealing, and buying guidance for this popular street photography and travel camera.

## OM System / Olympus Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [OM System OM-1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-om-1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-1 flagship Micro Four Thirds mirrorless camera. Rated at 400,000 actuations. Notes that in-file shutter count is not confirmed for OM System ORF files and recommends checking via the camera menu.
- [OM System OM-1 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/om-system-om-1-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-1 Mark II (2024). Covers the 400,000-actuation rated shutter life, improvements over the original OM-1 (expanded AI AF, 120 fps burst, 4K/120p video), and how to check the count via camera menu since ORF files do not store a confirmed shutter-count tag.
- [OM System OM-5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/om-system-om-5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-5 (2022) mid-range Micro Four Thirds mirrorless camera. Estimated shutter life around 200,000 actuations (not officially rated by OM System). Explains the difference from the OM-1, weather sealing features, and how to check via camera menu.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em1-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark II (2016). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, how to check via camera menu or ExifTool MakerNote since ORF files don't store a confirmed shutter-count tag, and buying guidance for this classic pro M4/3 body with 5.5-stop IBIS.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em1-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark III (2020). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, computational photography modes (Handheld High-Res Shot, Live ND) that use the electronic shutter, ORF file behavior, and how to check via camera menu.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M5 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em5-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M5 Mark III (2019) compact mid-range Micro Four Thirds camera. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations. Covers IP53 weather sealing, 7.5-stop IBIS, Handheld High-Res Shot, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), and how to check via camera menu.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark IV Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em10-mark-iv-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark IV (2020) entry-level Micro Four Thirds camera. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially rated). Covers the absence of weather sealing, 4.5-stop IBIS, ORF file behavior, and what to check when buying this popular beginner camera used.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em10-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark III (2017) entry-level Micro Four Thirds camera. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially rated). Covers the 16.1 MP sensor, 4-stop 5-axis IBIS, 4K/30p video, lack of weather sealing, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), and how to check via camera INFO screen or ExifTool.

## Panasonic Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Panasonic Lumix S9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-s9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S9 (2024). The S9 uses a fully electronic shutter — no mechanical shutter exists, so traditional shutter count does not apply. Explains what to check instead when buying used.
- [Panasonic Lumix S5 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s5-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S5 II (2023). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated mechanical shutter, why Panasonic does not store shutter count in RW2 files, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app, and the difference between S5 II and S5 IIX.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH6 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh6-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH6 (2022). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, the impact of video-heavy use on mechanical shutter wear, and buying guidance for this video-first camera.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the iconic Panasonic Lumix GH5 (2017). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, how to check via camera menu since RW2 files don't include the count, and why video-focused GH5 bodies often have very low mechanical shutter counts despite heavy use.
- [Panasonic Lumix G9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G9 (2017) stills-focused Micro Four Thirds flagship. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, RW2 file behavior (count not embedded), how to check via camera menu, the G9's 20 fps burst capability, and 6.5-stop Dual IS 2 IBIS system.
- [Panasonic Lumix G85 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g85-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G85 (G80 outside North America, 2016). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, weather sealing (splash/dust), 5-axis Dual IS 2 IBIS, and 4K Photo mode which uses the electronic shutter and adds no mechanical wear.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH7 (2024), the latest GH flagship and first GH camera with phase-detection AF. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, RW2 file behavior, internal ProRes recording, and why video-heavy use results in very low mechanical shutter counts.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH4 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh4-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH4 (2014) — the first consumer camera with internal 4K/UHD video. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or ExifTool, and why video-heavy use results in very low mechanical shutter counts on used GH4 bodies.
- [Panasonic Lumix S5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S5 (2020) — Panasonic's entry-level full-frame L-mount mirrorless camera. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app, and buying guidance for this popular full-frame/video hybrid.
- [Panasonic Lumix G9 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g9-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G9 II (2023) — the first G-series camera with phase-detection AF. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu, and why its high-speed burst capability doesn't wear the mechanical shutter when using electronic shutter mode.
- [Panasonic Lumix G7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G7 (2015) — one of the first consumer cameras with internal 4K video. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Image App, 4K Photo mode (electronic shutter only, no mechanical wear), and buying guidance for this widely available used camera.
- [Panasonic Lumix S1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S1 (2019) — the original full-frame L-mount mirrorless body from the L-Mount Alliance. Covers the high 400,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't embed the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync, and buying guidance for this professional-grade full-frame body.
- [Panasonic Lumix S1R Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s1r-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S1R (2019) — Panasonic's 47.3 MP high-resolution full-frame L-mount mirrorless camera. Covers the 400,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, the important caveat that High Resolution Shot mode consumes 8 mechanical actuations per composite image, and buying guidance.

## Pentax Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Pentax K-1 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-1-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-1 Mark II (2018) — Pentax's only full-frame DSLR. Covers the ~300,000-actuation rated shutter, how to extract the count from PEF RAW files via ExifTool (PEF not yet supported in shuttercount.app browser tool), camera menu method, weather sealing, and IBIS with Pixel Shift Resolution.
- [Pentax K-3 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-3-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-3 Mark III (2021) APS-C flagship DSLR. Covers the ~300,000-actuation rated shutter, PEF ExifTool extraction method, built-in GPS Astrotracer II, 92-point weather sealing, and buying guidance for this sports and wildlife photographer's DSLR.
- [Pentax K-1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-1 (2016) — Pentax's first full-frame DSLR. Covers the ~300,000-actuation rated shutter, how to extract the count from PEF RAW files via ExifTool (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool), 87 weather seals, 36.4 MP sensor, Pixel Shift Resolution System, and how Pixel Shift use multiplies shutter actuations 4× per scene.
- [Pentax K-3 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-3-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-3 Mark II (2015) APS-C DSLR. Covers the ~200,000-actuation rated shutter, PEF MakerNote ExifTool extraction (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool), built-in GPS with AstroTracer, Real Resolution (Pixel Shift) system, and what to check when buying used — including GPS function and weather sealing.

## Chinese Language Pages (中文)

SEO-optimized content pages in Simplified Chinese targeting high-volume Baidu search queries.

- [快门次数查询 — 什么是快门次数及如何查看](https://shuttercount.app/zh/kuaimen-cishu/): Explains what shutter count is, why it matters, and how to check it online for free using ShutterCount. Targets the query 快门次数查询 (shutter count check).
- [购买二手相机前必查快门次数](https://shuttercount.app/zh/erjishou-xiangji/): Guide for buying used cameras in China (闲鱼, 转转 marketplaces). Explains how to verify shutter count before purchase, with a condition rating table. Targets 二手相机快门次数 (used camera shutter count).
- [相机快门寿命 — 各品牌机型快门额定次数完整表](https://shuttercount.app/zh/kuaimen-shouming/): Full shutter lifespan reference table for Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, and Olympus models. Targets 相机快门寿命 (camera shutter lifespan).
- [Canon 相机快门次数在线查询 — 免费](https://shuttercount.app/zh/canon/): Canon brand page in Chinese listing all supported EOS R mirrorless and EOS DSLR models with their rated shutter lives. Targets Canon相机快门次数 (Canon camera shutter count).
- [免费查 EXIF 快门次数数据 — 在线工具](https://shuttercount.app/zh/exif-kuaimen/): Explains how EXIF metadata stores shutter count, how ShutterCount reads it locally without uploading files, and which file formats are supported. Targets EXIF快门数据免费查 (free EXIF shutter data check).

## Japanese SEO Pages (/ja/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Japanese targeting high-volume Google Japan search queries.

- [シャッター回数とは — カメラの使用回数を無料で確認](https://shuttercount.app/ja/shutter-kaisu/): Overview page explaining what shutter count is, why it matters, and how to check it. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry/mid/enthusiast/pro). Targets シャッター回数 (shutter count).
- [シャッター回数の確認方法 — 無料オンラインツールで簡単チェック](https://shuttercount.app/ja/shutter-kaisu-kakunin/): Step-by-step HowTo guide for checking shutter count using ShutterCount, with a comparison table of methods (online tool vs ExifTool vs camera menu). Targets シャッター回数 確認 (check shutter count).
- [中古カメラのシャッター回数 — 購入前に確認すべき基準](https://shuttercount.app/ja/chuko-camera/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Japanese marketplaces (Mercari, Yahoo Auctions). Includes condition rating table and per-model shutter tolerance guide. Targets 中古カメラ シャッター回数 (used camera shutter count).
- [カメラのシャッター寿命 — メーカー別の耐久回数の目安](https://shuttercount.app/ja/shutter-jumyo/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, and OM System models. Includes advice on extending shutter life. Targets シャッター寿命 (shutter lifespan).
- [シャッター枚数とは — 回数との違いと無料確認ツール](https://shuttercount.app/ja/shutter-maisuu/): Clarifies that シャッター枚数 (shutter maisuu) and シャッター回数 are synonymous terms for shutter actuations. Answers common questions about electronic shutter, video, and burst shooting. Targets シャッター枚数 (shutter shot count).

## Korean SEO Pages (/ko/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Korean targeting high-volume Google Korea search queries. South Korea has one of the highest camera ownership rates per capita, with active used camera markets (당근마켓, 중고나라).

- [셔터 횟수란? — 카메라 셔터 횟수 무료 확인](https://shuttercount.app/ko/shutter-hoetsu/): Overview page explaining what shutter count is, why it matters, and how to check it. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry/mid/enthusiast/pro). Targets 셔터 횟수 (shutter count).
- [셔터 횟수 확인 방법 — 무료 온라인으로 간단 체크](https://shuttercount.app/ko/shutter-hoetsu-hwakgin/): Step-by-step HowTo guide for checking shutter count using ShutterCount, with a comparison table of methods (online tool vs ExifTool vs camera menu) and supported file formats. Targets 셔터 횟수 확인 (check shutter count).
- [중고 카메라 셔터 횟수 — 구매 전 반드시 확인하세요](https://shuttercount.app/ko/junggo-kamera/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Korean marketplaces (당근마켓, 중고나라). Includes condition rating table (A–D) by usage percentage and a used camera buying checklist. Targets 중고 카메라 셔터 횟수 (used camera shutter count).
- [카메라 셔터 수명 — 브랜드별 내구 횟수 완전 정리](https://shuttercount.app/ko/shutter-sumyeong/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm models. Includes shutter failure symptoms and replacement cost guidance. Targets 셔터 수명 (shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF 셔터 횟수 무료 확인 — 온라인 도구](https://shuttercount.app/ko/exif-shutter/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote metadata stores shutter count, how ShutterCount reads it locally without uploading files, and which RAW/JPEG formats are supported per manufacturer. Targets EXIF 셔터 횟수 (EXIF shutter count).

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://shuttercount.app/llms-full.txt): Extended version with full page descriptions and FAQ content for each camera model page.
